name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I'm stoked to show you these new tees!
body:
Have you seen this collection yet? | Friend --

It's tough to beat the people watching on a campaign. When supporters gather for a phone bank or house party, the energy is infectious, the conversation is exciting, and then, believe it or not, there's the fashion. I always love it when people show off their style and support for their favorite candidates!

That’s why I’m stoked to share two new tees that have just hit our Shop. They’re part of the Made for History collection -- our limited-edition line of shirts designed by some of the biggest and coolest names in fashion.

**Take a look:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
When you buy one, ALL proceeds will go straight to helping elect Hillary and other Democrats. We’re trying to build a 50-state campaign to make sure Hillary wins the White House and has a Congress she can work with -- the only way we can win in November is by investing in our organization today.

**Check out the whole collection, and find a shirt that shows off your style AND your support for Hillary and Democrats all across America. Wear it to the next event on your calendar or the next place you want to feel fun and fashion-forward!** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU5MDE0MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNTI0OTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Team Gregg
subject: VIDEO: He failed Carrier workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Be one of the first to see our hard-hitting new ad -- before it hits the airwaves.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6739495605741422592?utm_campaign=fnd_CarrAd_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160705_fnd_gq_CarrAd_ful__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, This morning, our hard-hitting new ad is going on the air -- and I wanted to give you the chance to see it first. **[Watch the video now -- and help us keep it on the air.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6739495605741422592?utm_campaign=fnd_CarrAd_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160705_fnd_gq_CarrAd_ful__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6739495605741422592?utm_campaign=fnd_CarrAd_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160705_fnd_gq_CarrAd_ful__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=) When thousands of Carrier workers found out their jobs were being shipped to Mexico, Governor Pence was asleep at the switch. During his twelve years in Congress, Pence repeatedly voted in favor of big tax giveaways to corporations -- even when they shipped Hoosier jobs overseas. But it's Indiana's working families that are paying the price. And even though Governor Pence found time to meet with Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and other big name out-of-state politicians, he still won't meet with workers who are losing their jobs at Carrier. **[We can't let Governor Pence sweep this under the rug. Watch the video now and help us spread the word.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6739495605741422592?utm_campaign=fnd_CarrAd_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160705_fnd_gq_CarrAd_ful__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for holding Governor Pence and his outsourcing friends accountable, Team Gregg
| | [**Watch the video ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6739495605741422592?utm_campaign=fnd_CarrAd_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160705_fnd_gq_CarrAd_ful__tg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6883610793817278464) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6955668387855206400)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/7596563875915761664/6667438011703494656).

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Our first TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
North Carolinians are fed up with Governor McCrory, and I understand why.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12021f3/2fde7c66/401c37d4/156a0204/3087642969/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/first-tv-ad?utm_campaign=fnd_tvad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160705_fnd_gq_tvad1_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Friend, North Carolinians are fed up with Governor McCrory, and I understand why. Whether it comes to our public education system, our economy, or just basic human equality, we deserve better. It's been a privilege to serve the state as Attorney General and have the chance to stand up for millions of North Carolinians every day. I think we can all agree it's time for a Governor who can say the same. [**Today, we're releasing our first television ad of this race -- be one of the first people to watch it.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12021f3/2fde7c66/401c37d4/156a0207/3087642969/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/first-tv-ad?utm_campaign=fnd_tvad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160705_fnd_gq_tvad1_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Today+were+releasing+our+first+televisio") [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12021f3/2fde7c66/401c37d4/156a0206/3087642969/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/first-tv-ad?utm_campaign=fnd_tvad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160705_fnd_gq_tvad1_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3") This ad could not happen without your generous contributions. Thanks for the fantastic work you are doing! Roy
| | [**Watch the video ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12021f3/2fde7c66/401c37d4/156a0219/3087642969/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/first-tv-ad?utm_campaign=fnd_tvad1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160705_fnd_gq_tvad1_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Watch+the+video+rarr")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina

It's been a privilege to serve the state as Attorney General and have the chance to stand up for millions of North Carolinians every day. name: Burke Byer
subject: [NEW TV AD] Rob is standing up to China
body:
| Peter -- At Byer Steel, we manufacture high-quality steel rebar, and when we can compete on a level playing field, nobody can beat us. You can watch our story in the Portman campaign's new TV ad that begins airing statewide tomorrow.

China is doing things to create an unfair playing field. The threat to American manufacturing is real and Rob Portman gets that. The reason we have 90 employees is because Rob gave us another fighting chance.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DBPYiXBsCI3Q%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=1)
Rob Portman is absolutely fighting for the American worker. Rob has taken the lead in standing up to China’s unfair trade practices. Rob's Level the Playing Field Act and the Enforce Act have led to two recent decisions that will further protect Ohio workers from China's unfair trade practices. Rob went the extra mile and testified on behalf of Ohio's workers in both cases and now additional Chinese steel products will face tariffs because of his efforts.[

Click here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DBPYiXBsCI3Q%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=2) to watch the Portman campaign’s new ad and learn more about how Rob is standing up for Ohio workers. Sincerely,

Burke Byer
Byer Steel [
](http://www.robportman.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=5)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=6)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=burke_steel&n=7). -=-=-

You can watch our story in the Portman campaign's new TV ad that begins airing statewide tomorrow. China is doing things to create an unfair playing field. The threat to American manufacturing is real and Rob Portman gets that. The reason we have 90 employees is because Rob gave us another fighting chance. Rob Portman is absolutely fighting for the American worker. Rob has taken the lead in standing up to China’s unfair trade practices. Rob's Level the Playing Field Act and the Enforce Act have led to two recent decisions that will further protect Ohio workers from China's unfair trade practices. Rob went the extra mile and testified on behalf of Ohio's workers in both cases and now additional Chinese steel products will face tariffs because of his efforts. to watch the Portman campaign’s new ad and learn more about how Rob is standing up for Ohio workers. Sincerely, Burke Byer Byer Steel -=-=-

name: Team Maggie
subject: SNEAK PEEK: New Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada5/3675441302/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada5/3675441302/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Friends --
We're releasing a new television ad, and we wanted to give our supporters a sneak peek. It's called "Spark," and it highlights how Governor Hassan has focused on innovation to drive New Hampshire's economy forward.
**Watch the ad here:**
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada6/3675441302/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20160705_spark?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&source=20160605_spark_nh-nd")
Maggie has fostered innovation in New Hampshire by expanding educational opportunities -- she froze tuition at state universities and lowered community college tuition. She also launched "Live Free and Start," a collaborative initiative that provides startups with the resources they need to thrive in New Hampshire. We're so proud that New Hampshire was named one of the top states for small businesses and entrepreneurs.
In the U.S. Senate, Maggie will work to help spark innovation and job creation the way she has in New Hampshire by using common sense problem-solving to support innovative businesses and affordable, quality education.****
**Watch the new ad here to learn more about Maggie's vision for expanding innovation:** [**http://www.maggiehassan.com/Spark**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada6/3675441302/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20160705_spark?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&source=20160605_spark_nh-nd")
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- Nearly $15 MILLION has been spent on ads to keep Maggie from winning. We don't have to raise $15 million, but we do need your help to keep this ad on the air. [**Please, donate $3 or whatever you can.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada7/3675441302/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA1X3NwYXJrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160705_spark_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada7/3675441302/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA1X3NwYXJrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160705_spark_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd58a/2a380d31/130aa2cd/fbada0/3675441302/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH

name: polling-team@katiemcginty.com
subject: You need to see this chart
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:

[**There 's no room to take our foot off the gas, friend. Will you chip in $5 to push Katie into the lead?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7184438902667608064/3552519870321000448?refcode=e20160705&refcode2=e20160705nd&amount=25)

We have a real chance to defeat Pat Toomey, take back the Senate, and send Katie to Washington to actually fight for Pennsylvania's working families -- but it all depends on if we can keep it up.

Team Katie

*** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Check out these photos from yesterday 📷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b5/1069743423/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b5/1069743423/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hey there --
Hope you had a wonderful Fourth of July! Governor Hassan and the team spent the day celebrating our country's birthday and talking to voters. It was so much fun to celebrate America and talk to grassroots supporters.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b6/1069743423/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/media/set/?set=a.1218950154806117.1073741855.134535726580904&type=1&l=dfde0666cc")
**[I just posted some of our favorite photos on our Facebook page-- be sure to check out the album here. And if you haven't already, "like" Maggie's page to show your support and receive important updates on the race.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b6/1069743423/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/media/set/?set=a.1218950154806117.1073741855.134535726580904&type=1&l=dfde0666cc")**
Thanks again for your support!
Jane Hughes
P.S. -- This weekend was a great celebration, but we still have a long road ahead of us. The polls show that this race is still neck-and-neck, so we can't take a summer vacation from the important work of making sure we win this November. **[Chip in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Maggie and take back the Senate majority.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b7/1069743423/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA1X0p1bHk0UGhvdG9zX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160705_July4Photos_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd585/2a380d31/130f9ddd/fba6b7/1069743423/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA1X0p1bHk0UGhvdG9zX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160705_July4Photos_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: LAST CHANCE: Our amendment to the platform
body:
#
Friday is important, sisters and brothers. That's our next chance before the Democratic convention to make sure that preventing the disastrous TPP trade agreement from getting a vote in Congress is part of the Democratic Party platform.
We're going to work hard for the Democratic Party to forcefully reject this job-killing trade deal, but we need your help to do so.
Here's the amendment we are offering when the platform committee meets again on July 8 in Orlando, Florida. [**We still need your signature to endorse this amendment. Add yours now before it's too late.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705")
**Our Amendment to the Democratic Party platform**
_"It is the policy of the Democratic Party that the Trans-Pacific Partnership must not get a vote in this Congress or in future sessions of Congress."_
---
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705")**
We're fighting to include this amendment to the Democratic Party platform because we want to prevent the outsourcing of jobs, protect the environment, stop pharmaceutical companies from increasing the price of prescription drugs, preserve our democracy, and respect human rights.
If we succeed, we will be in a very strong position to stop a vote on the TPP and to fundamentally rewrite our trade agreements to end the race to the bottom and lift up the living standards of people in this country and throughout the world.
Our next shot at winning this is at the platform meeting in Orlando on Friday.
[**Winning this fight starts with adding your name to say you want the Democratic Party platform to oppose a vote on the disastrous TPP. Click here to add your name now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/tpp-dnc?source=em160705")
Thanks for speaking out about this critical issue.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: How to break the law and get away with it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA
body:
| | | | Today, the FBI admitted that Hillary Clinton endangered the American people--but did not recommend criminal charges.
---
---
| | | [](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/114CjQSPZM8s73QQjreNron)
---
| | |
## Friend,
## ****Today, the FBI admitted that Hillary Clinton endangered the American people --and confirmed that the worst things any of us imagined about Hillary's email server were true.**
---
|
* FBI Director James Comey concluded that **Hillary was "extremely careless"** in handling our nation's secrets.

* He admitted that **no reasonable person** could have believed putting these emails on a private server was at all appropriate or acceptable.

* He admitted that **110 emails on the server were classified** at the time they were sent--showing that Hillary not only lied, but knowingly endangered national security as Secretary of State.

* He admitted that **Hillary deleted work-related emails** before turning them over to the State Department, despite her claims otherwise.

* And most shocking, Mr. Comey even admitted that it's **likely foreign governments hacked her emails** --and that our adversaries could know critical secrets about the U.S. government because of Hillary's actions.

**But when you're a Clinton, none of this matters.** Not when you have the ear of the President, or you can call a secret airport meeting with the Attorney General. Not when you behave as if you're above the law, and will never be held responsible for your actions. Mr. Comey admitted that someone caught in a similar situation would "often" be punished. And yet, he announced the FBI would not recommend criminal charges for Hillary Clinton. **It's not just a miscarriage of justice, but a blow to the very heart of our democracy.** This is a shameful day for the rule of law and the security of our nation, no matter what your political beliefs may be. The Obama Administration might be circling the wagons, and doing all they can to prop up their corrupt, incompetent, untrustworthy Democratic nominee--_but the American people know better._ **And if our government won't make her face consequences, voters will.** I'm counting on you to help me fight--and make sure we stop Hillary Clinton however we can in the weeks and months to come. **Carly**

---
---

| | |
##### PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/u/1aGI9Dw1HTJy0jUADPBM) if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Carly for America.
---

name: Barack Obama
subject: I want you to get a chance to come to the Democratic convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
There is something magical about it | Friend --

When I stepped onto the stage at the Democratic National Convention in 2004 to give the keynote address, I was confident and anxious -- all at the same time. I’d given speeches before, but before I got asked to come to Boston, I'd never even used a teleprompter.

But when I stood in that arena full of proud, passionate Democrats and said that Republicans are our brothers and sisters -- that the politics of hope is more powerful than politics as usual -- and I heard the cheers and felt the electricity, I knew it was a moment in my life I would never forget.

That’s what it feels like to be at a Democratic convention.

In just a few weeks we will meet in Philadelphia for another exciting and historic convention, and I couldn’t be prouder of the fact that we will be nominating Hillary Clinton to be our party’s nominee.

**[Would you like to be there, too? And would you like to meet Hillary? Add your name to be automatically entered for a chance to win a free flight, hotel, and credentials to the convention.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It’s hard to believe that it was only twelve years ago that I gave that speech. The journey we have taken together as a nation since then has been extraordinary. From reviving the auto industry to reining in Wall Street, from guaranteeing health care for 20 million people to restoring our standing around the world, we have achieved so much together. And there’s more work to do.

While so much has changed, I believe in the promise of America as much today as I did in 2004. I believe in it just as I did in 2008, when at that Democratic convention, I spoke to the American people as our party’s nominee -- I still believe, just like I said that night, that we cannot walk alone.

There is something magical about a Democratic convention, and the chance to affirm our values as Democrats, as Americans, and as each other’s keepers. I can’t wait for this one.

**Sign up to be automatically entered for a chance to win a free trip to Philadelphia to attend the historic 2016 Democratic National Convention and meet Hillary:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- and I hope to see you there,

Barack

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary -- and be automatically entered to meet her at the Democratic convention in Philadelphia:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) on 7/5/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 7/11/16. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate to Hillary for America, or enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to volunteer for Hillary for America, or enter by texting CONVENTION to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, volunteering, or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia where they will meet Hillary Clinton; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Philadelphia area; and three (3) nights hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: $2500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU5MTAwODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNzAxNjU4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Greitens Breaking News
subject: the latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Team Greitens just released our latest TV ad. [Click here to watch it](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabauhBG8oGtvpApHddltgYedvbfh3D5xy7MZ7g8htbGT-2Bg_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLzWvztNKPWB-2BBNzv6-2BDue5m80K24KT2XkLzZF2aVa6FYySj5WXdL6iycajDQoyXRSjhKHsrGxRcd3lbFWiOrFJBWUEdUM8mJ6TP6-2B4IGox5xbkEAKiANy8dTsaXiv5kTViCoURTTbdNWsdHZEBrdVS3GLPulyOJeubv6sXSpZQm1KUOr4HZ-2BVY9N-2FYvMXg6cWGQx-2BOOCZcuZDWpxiDIS5z0qUGP5SITPXq-2FeUp07RyeADpow4npsjXiKYzUWdHv1F8RdbudTZ-2BZ5y-2B8VJGWwWZ-2FBfQT7BGAunioduuKvef5cVT7Mr4lRdTYIqnhUz-2FYlcq). I think you'll like it... it really packs a punch.
I believe this ad effectively communicates our message as a conservative outsider who will take on politics as usual in Jeff City, and win the big fights. If you agree, [please chip-in $3 today](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabauhBG8oGtvpApHddltgYedvbfh3D5xy7MZ7g8htbGT-2Bg_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLzWvztNKPWB-2BBNzv6-2BDue5m80K24KT2XkLzZF2aVa6FYySj5WXdL6iycajDQoyXRSjhKHsrGxRcd3lbFWiOrFJBWUEdUM8mJ6TP6-2B4IGox5xZ3eV9qWh5QL-2BVzfq82oKYqNVr92Lqhvwndv738wTTJHNN0mtX-2F09ydcxMsdzy7xt0ncAv25jOznVUMzaMFYz8PQYJCldzf3gTKFNJrfd1jGidQEsstF1UkV7iAHDD88TQqWkq5eHAGJXnaldVZ3tKCRvLE48W1FuUUyM3BeNausHAevZOHcJ8figqQoahEOYPG07jsT-2FsTxYJ628HZvMSm) to help us continue airing it statewide.
On to Victory,
AC
Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: The system is rigged
body:
We must hold Crooked Hillary accountable in November.
| | |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w3Lj6rIPUmldBCByzDPzfxm) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| **It's unbelievable, Peter!**
The FBI confirms - Hillary lied and compromised National Security
I'm sure you saw the news today . . .

Despite finding 110 emails containing highly classified information, in 52 different email chains, the FBI has recommended no charges against Hillary Clinton for her dangerous email practices.

**The system is rigged Peter - we must hold Lying Crooked Hillary accountable at the ballot box in November**.

**[STOP HILLARY](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w3PirN9zfRjclOt7XZyxRCX)**
FBI Director James Comey described Hillary Clinton as **"extremely careless"** in her handling of classified information.

_He even detailed how her terrible decisions led to huge security risks as she gallivanted across the globe_.

And what did Lying Crooked Hillary say less than a year ago?

_"I'm confident that this process will prove that I never sent nor received any e-mail that was marked classified."_

**110 emails were found containing classified material** . . . _including "top secret" information_ , AFTER Hillary and her cronies deleted 30,000 emails and failed to turn over hundreds more.

**She's careless. She's incompetent. And she thinks she's above the law**. Yet no charges are recommended against Crooked Hillary.

[**Plain and simple: this reckless behavior should disqualify Hillary Clinton from the Presidency**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w3ThN8AiBmhb60kHmlhwtIy).

Unfortunately, the FBI's announcement today should come as no surprise. **The system is rigged for the powerful elites like Lying Crooked Hillary**.

That WILL change if I am elected to serve as the next President of the United States. But I need friends like you helping us continue building momentum behind Team Trump.

**[STOP HILLARY](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w3Xh8u11WRf9QccgKH0v5O9)**
I had been aggressively urging the FBI to hold Lying Crooked Hillary accountable. Now it is clear that is not going to happen - **we must hold her accountable this November at the ballot box**.

This election is the trial, and the American people are the jury.

_I will be counting on your help to defeat Clinton and her cronies_ , to end the rigged system and Make America Great Again.

Best Wishes,
[](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w41gtPrLimd8Ao3Q92JtHTK)
Donald Trump
Candidate for President of the United States

**[STOP HILLARY](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11w45fPaSuDRb7kzVpxossjZl)**
